creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun Apr  6 05:47:13 2014
New Revision: 350300
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/350300
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r350300/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, remove Author line
  
  PR:		188097
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/x11/p5-X11-Protocol/Makefile
  head/x11/p5-X11-Protocol/pkg-descr

Modified: head/x11/p5-X11-Protocol/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11/p5-X11-Protocol/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:47:08 2014	(r350299)
+++ head/x11/p5-X11-Protocol/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:47:13 2014	(r350300)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	x11 perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl module that provides an interface roughly equivalent to Xlib
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
 

Modified: head/x11/p5-X11-Protocol/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/x11/p5-X11-Protocol/pkg-descr	Sun Apr  6 05:47:08 2014	(r350299)
+++ head/x11/p5-X11-Protocol/pkg-descr	Sun Apr  6 05:47:13 2014	(r350300)
@@ -4,5 +4,4 @@ as the author is working on a higher-lev
 more object-oriented and easier to use, so as to allow this low
 level access to eventually be replaced by an XS interface to Xlib.
 
-Author: Stephen McCamant
 WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/X11-Protocol/
